# Customer / Vehicle Scope

## Purpose
This document defines the Customer and Vehicle foundation scope for MOGHARE360 ERP Soft Run.

## Included Scope
Mission 14 designs:
- Customer foundation
- Customer phone/contact foundation
- Vehicle foundation
- Vehicle ownership relationship
- Customer-to-vehicle relationship rules
- Soft Run required fields
- SQL implementation plan
- UI plan
- Testing plan

## Excluded Scope
Mission 14 does not include:
- Customer Portal
- Customer login
- Tenant implementation
- Legacy migration execution
- SQL execution
- PHP implementation
- Production deploy

## Soft Run Goal
The Soft Run must support controlled internal use for registering:
- customer identity
- customer contact data
- vehicle identity
- customer vehicle relationship

## Final Scope Decision
Customer and Vehicle foundation is locked as an ERP internal foundation, not a public customer portal.
